title: oxalis dolichopoda
intro: Oxalis dolichopoda, also known as the "yellow woodsorrel" or "long-stemmed wood sorrel", is a perennial plant species native to South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of oxalic acid, which has been shown to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oxalis dolichopoda include its potential to help treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Oxalis dolichopoda often involve the leaves and roots being dried and then used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
